name: the net
identity: A restraint item used to temporarily immobilize the player character, later removed upon the elder's silent approval.
current_status: No longer restricting movement; the player is free to act, though still slightly affected by a previous injury.

description.value: A heavy, net-like contraption woven from thick, icy vines, disguised as part of the snow-covered environment.

appearance.value: a woven restraint, likely made from natural fibers

function.value: used as a temporary restraint or capture mechanism
